title: BIDER: Bridging Knowledge Inconsistency for Efficient Retrieval-Augmented LLMs

defines.name: BIDER
defines.definition: A retrieval-document refiner that bridges knowledge inconsistency by converting retrieved documents into key supporting evidence for downstream LLMs.

problem: Retrieved documents in RAG are often long, noisy, and misaligned with the knowledge actually needed by LLMs, which hurts answer quality.
